label: Bunny
description: Cute primitive-built bunny with procedural motions.

actions.name: idle
actions.label: Idle
actions.description: Calm resting pose with ear twitch.

actions.name: wave
actions.label: Wave
actions.description: Raise a paw and wave hello.

actions.name: dance
actions.label: Dance
actions.description: Dance in place to a beat.

actions.name: walkForward
actions.description: Walk one step toward the kid.

actions.name: walkBack
actions.description: Walk one step away from the kid.

actions.name: walkLeft
actions.description: Walk one step to the kid's left.

actions.name: walkRight
actions.description: Walk one step to the kid's right.
